coverage_note: The bundled COMT population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from COMT catecholamine methylation, dopamine/norepinephrine turnover, prefrontal neurotransmitter tone, and methyl-donor use and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000093010: COMT coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: COMT findings should be read against catecholamine methylation, dopamine/norepinephrine turnover, prefrontal neurotransmitter tone, and methyl-donor use; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs4680 (COMT Val158Met) is curated as a COMT marker for Catecholamine metabolism and prefrontal dopamine tone, Pain, stress, and cognition association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
